purpose: The default-threshold twin of threshold-number-gate-two: same graph/fact/rule with no custom_thresholds — the popular(y) clause's single qualifying grounding (B) satisfies the default greater_equal/number/total 1, so trendy(A) derives at t=1. The pair pins that an accepted number threshold gates at the clause level (qualifying-grounding count across the whole clause, check_node_grounding_threshold_satisfaction interpretation.py:1364-1377), not per head grounding.
